question_text: Which of the following would produce the largest moment when the same force is applied?

options.label: A
options.text: A 20 N force applied 0.5 m from the pivot

options.label: B
options.text: A 20 N force applied 2 m from the pivot

options.label: C
options.text: A 20 N force applied 0.2 m from the pivot

options.label: D
options.text: A 20 N force applied at the pivot

explanation: Moment increases with distance from the pivot. Since all forces are equal (20 N), the greatest distance (2 m) produces the largest moment: 20 × 2 = 40 N m. This is why we push door handles far from the hinge.
